content: vo sab to theek hai lekin aap kese hai?
Main theek hoon, dhanyavad. Aapke swasthya ke bare mein kuchh charcha karna chahte hain?
Theek hai, agar aapko kisi bhi samay kuchh chahiye ho, to mujhe bataiye.
Main yahan hoon, aapke liye uplabdh hoon. Agar aapko kisi bhi tarah ki madad ya samarthan ki avashyakta hai, to kripaya mujhe bataiye.
hai naaaaaaaaa.. vooo naaa.. thoda sa naa

Main samajh gaya, aap thoda udasin lag rahe hain. Aap apne dil ki baat mujhse share kar sakte hain, main sunne ke liye yahan hoon. Ek practical suggestion: Thoda sa aram karein aur apne vicharon ko likhne ki koshish karein, yeh aapko thoda bahatar mehsoos kara sakta hai.
